svg.text: ESP32 LED Controller v6 — DIP-14 Pin-Location Schematic
U1 shown as actual 74AHCT125N DIP-14 top view: notch up, pins 1–7 left side, pins 14–8 right side.
This is the bench-wiring view: every IC pin location and net is explicit.
from USB/VIN only — do not backfeed
1) +12V_PROTECTED ↔ +5V_LOGIC = open/megaohms. 2) All GND points common ≈0Ω. 3) U1 pins 10 and 13 are +5V_LOGIC, not GND.
4) U1 pin 14 gets USB-derived +5V only; do not backfeed ESP32 VIN from the 12V supply. 5) Full LED current stays off solderless breadboard.
Top-view DIP orientation matters: notch at top, pin 1 upper-left, pin 14 upper-right.
